name: oxygen-html-converter-core
description: Node-based frontend behavior tests for Oxygen HTML Converter core plugin.

scripts.test:artifact: npm run install:zip && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:live:artifact && npm run test:visual
scripts.check: npm run check:release-hygiene && npm run test:js && composer lint:phpcs && composer lint:phpstan && composer test
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:php
